GUCCI 2026SS Early Spring New Arrival. Perfect condition full orders! Classic five-pocket men's straight-leg jeans with signature monogram patchwork. Waist features monogram accents, adding a highlight. Tailored fit with premium hardware, refined and textured. Classic versatile raw-wash denim, highly practical and easy to match. GUCCI 2026SS Early Spring New Denim Jeans! Extremely high-end! Perfect style and fit with high recognition. Fashionable and ideal for spring and summer. The entire pair exudes exceptional elegance and excellent craftsmanship. Sizes: 29-38 (excluding 35 and 37).

Top and pants GUCCI 2026SS Lunar New Year set with a fold-over collar, half-placket long-sleeve sweatshirt, and straight-leg pants. Part of the New Year collection, made from custom YB imported pure cotton, soft and skin-friendly. Features brushed fleece lining for warmth in autumn and winter. The fold-over collar and long sleeves offer a stylish casual look. Half-placket front with single-side chest embroidery outlining the double G logo, accented with chain buckle details. The overall design exudes sophistication and high-end style. Loose fit adds vitality, paired with matching straight-leg drawstring pants. Coordinated logo details unify the look. Relaxed silhouette for a minimalist, upscale vibe. Essential for autumn and winter casual sportswear fashion. Custom fabrics. Sizes: S-XL.

Top and Pants GUCCI jacquard print casual sports set, made of imported high-count cotton blend jacquard fabric. Soft, crisp texture with delicate touch, breathable and wrinkle-resistant. The jacquard pattern is three-dimensional and refined, enhancing both quality and brand recognition. Features a stand collar with half-zip, ribbed collar with moderate elasticity fitting the neck, smooth and durable metal zipper with branded pull for easy wear and added detail. Two side welt pockets with neat stitching, combining practicality and decoration. Ribbed cuffs and hem are finely crafted, shape-retentive and flattering. Straight loose cut pants with slit hems for a stylish touch. Elastic waistband with adjustable drawstring fits various body shapes. The jacquard pattern is precisely woven, fully printed in orderly alignment on a navy base, subtly showcasing brand elegance. Overall loose casual fit suits all body types. Sizes: S-XL.

Complete set or separate sale: GUCCI 2026FW Early Spring new hardware logo minimalist casual suit and trousers set.  
Flat notch lapel, a timeless formal symbol, balances formality and casual style, suitable for business meetings, office, and light business dinners.  
Two-button closure enhances body proportions, outlining sharp shoulders and smooth waistline, featuring hidden haute couture tailoring details.  
Set crafted with same-color precise stitching, showcasing brand’s sewing heritage; every stitch reflects ultimate quality pursuit.  
From fabric selection to fit refinement, detail handling to style presentation, this suit perfectly blends premium materials and exquisite craftsmanship, ideal for urban elites to express taste and style.  
Break away from ordinary workwear; unlock a calm, refined, and textured masculine charm with this masterpiece suit.

Top and Jeans GUCCI jacquard denim jacket and jeans set. Custom denim jacquard fabric, soft and comfortable like cotton. Deep blue base with ivory highlights, weaving a luxurious flowing marble pattern across the denim warp and weft. Full-print marble effect complements the leather back label, enhancing brand recognition. Zipper detail adds a luxurious touch, breaking conventions to create wearable art. The set embodies luxury street style.

Fabric jacquard technique creates a 3D marble effect by precisely controlling yarn density and tension. Electrolytic deep blue and stone-wash process: uses electrochemical reaction to alter fabric color, then mills with abrasives and hot water wash for a unique finish. Light double wash: desizing and sand washing produce faded and special color-contrast effects through chemical treatment.

Sizes: Jacket 44-46-48-50; Pants 34-36-38-40 (S-XL).

Top and pants GUCCI patch-detail half-zip sweatshirt and sweatpants set, made from 95% recycled viscose and 5% spandex for a second-skin softness. The viscose fibers naturally absorb and evaporate sweat quickly. Special knit structure provides fluid drape; added spandex ensures freedom of movement. Logo embroidery patches use 0.3mm ultra-fine polyester thread, laser-cut for 12 hours to create a relief effect. Each patch undergoes five anti-wrinkle treatments to maintain shape after washing. Special textile structure traps 0.8-1.2ml of still air per cm³ inside, with gradient density guiding moisture outwards. Sizes: S-XL.

Top and trousers Gucci embossed logo zipper sweatshirt and sweatpants set. Custom-dyed navy blue luxurious soft fleece plain knit fabric—light, soft, comfortable, and skin-friendly. Deep navy blue base tone exudes calm and elegance. Signature Gucci logo finely detailed, subtle yet impactful. White piping trim adds a perfect finishing touch, achieving visual harmony. Half-high collar zipper design, clean and sharp. The set embodies luxury street style.

Steel-stamped embossing uses original Gucci steel molds pressed onto the fabric surface, creating high precision and strong 3D effect. Piping trim cut to original size, carefully aligned and sewn to fabric edges, folded for neatness, ensuring durability and aesthetics. Fabric is washed for better texture, resistant to deformation, shrinkage, and fading, maintaining long-lasting beauty. Sizes: S-XL.

GUCCI 2025SS multicolor GG canvas shorts from the early autumn collection blend refined texture, exquisite patterns, and captivating colors for an elevated everyday wardrobe. Crafted in GG canvas, fully adorned with GG jacquard, showcasing distinctive elegance. Sizes: S-XL.

Gucci Wine Red Linen Pants, Ultimate Breathability. The highly sought-after Gucci pants are here. The wine red color exudes a premium vibe. Made of 75% Tencel and 25% linen, this "soft gold blend" offers 360° breathability, keeping you sweat-free—like having air conditioning on your legs in summer! Loose fit hides flaws and feels casual. Slightly flared hems elongate the legs. Back waistband features embroidered double G logo, subtly showcasing luxury quality. Perfect with a simple tee for a relaxed look or a crop top for a bold style. One pair refreshes your entire wardrobe. For those who value breathability and quality—must-have! Sizes: XS-L.

Gucci letter logo cotton poplin trousers, made from cotton fiber with a plain weave featuring warp threads twice the density of weft threads, creating a fine, uniform diamond texture. The fabric is smooth with a slight sheen. Pure cotton offers moisture absorption and breathability, preventing stuffiness. The high-density structure enhances durability and wrinkle resistance. Sizes: 46-52.
